plan.name: Phase 2P — Performance on Synthetic
plan.spec_breakage_rationale: No changes to §4 (contracts), §6 (research loop), §7 (per-desk gates), §8 (controller), §9 (attribution), §10 (regime classifier), §11 (LLM routing). Schema appends to §3.2 persistence are additive only. Adds §12.3 Phase 2P done-criterion section.
plan.supersedes: Plan-mode diagnostic artefact from the preceding session turn (parked at the same plan-file path).

prior_session_state.v1_16_restructure: complete; desk roster oil 5→3 + equity 2 shipped (surface_positioning_feedback merged, earnings_calendar added)

diagnostic_findings.pnl_sharpe_drawdown_backtest_grep_interp: Only hit is a docstring on contracts/v1.py:49 Horizon dataclass. Zero P&L accumulation code.
diagnostic_findings.real_data_http_ingestion_grep_interpreta: All 3 hits in tests/test_phase2_portability_contract.py are vocabulary-containment strings (negative-assertion). Zero ingestion code.
diagnostic_findings.main_duckdb_note: Only soak_phase1.duckdb (4.5 MB, 2026-04-17 dry-run). Tests use tmp_path or :memory:.
diagnostic_findings.execution_order_routing_grep_interpretat: Controller.decide emits a position_size float; no downstream consumer exists.

context.gap_framing: The architectural claim (§1.1 zero shared-infra diff under redeployment) is proven. The performance claim has never been measured. Phase 2P fills the measurement gap, then materially improves P&L and Sharpe on the synthetic markets already in the repo. Stays inside spec §1.2 synthetic-only by explicit user direction; real-data wiring parked as Phase 3.

user_selected_scope.data_scope_rationale: Stay within spec §1.2. Preserves architectural vs real-data-validation claim separation. Real-data wiring remains Phase 3.
user_selected_scope.acceptance_tier_rationale: Matches D1 debit scope (model-quality weak but architecture works). Falsifiable upfront; pre-registered thresholds prevent post-hoc Goodhart.

acceptance_criteria.name: Positive P&L
acceptance_criteria.threshold: >= 7 of 10 seeds end with cumulative P&L > 0

acceptance_criteria.name: Strict invariants
acceptance_criteria.threshold: Gate 3 passes 3/3 under backtest; full test suite green; D12 golden fixtures byte-identical
acceptance_criteria.measurement_layer: existing test suite + new G1 integration test

parts.name: Measurement infrastructure
parts.description: Prerequisite. P&L accumulator + canonical risk/reward metrics + transaction-cost model + schema append.

commits.title: feat(eval): P&L accumulator + PnlEvent
commits.scope: PnlEvent dataclass + accumulate_pnl(decisions, prints) pure function. Handles stale desks (weight 0 → zero P&L). Attribution-ready via LODO decomposition.

commits.title: feat(eval): linear transaction-cost model
commits.scope: Linear commission + slippage. TransactionCostConfig defaults commission_bps=0.5, slippage_bps=1.5. Emits per-decision cost; subtracts from gross P&L.

commits.title: feat(eval): Sharpe / Sortino / drawdown / turnover metrics
commits.scope: Pure functions over P&L series. sharpe_ratio(returns, periods_per_year=252), sortino_ratio, max_drawdown (depth/start/trough/recovery tuple), calmar_ratio, turnover. Stateless.

commits.title: feat(persistence): pnl_events + backtest_runs schema append
commits.scope: Append two tables (non-breaking per §4.6): pnl_events (per-decision P&L) + backtest_runs (per-scenario aggregate + code_commit + config snapshot). Matches §3.2 precedent (feed_incidents / feed_latency_state added v1.7).

parts.name: Backtest harness
parts.description: Walk-forward OOS runner + multi-seed sweep + CLI.

commits.title: feat(eval): walk-forward OOS backtest runner
commits.scope: run_backtest(latent_path, desks, controller_params, regime_classifier, costs) → BacktestResult. Fits on [0, TRAIN_END), drives Controller over [TRAIN_END, n_days-HORIZON). Pure function modulo tmp DuckDB; replay-deterministic.

commits.title: feat(eval): multi-seed backtest runner + parallelism
commits.scope: run_multi_seed(seeds, config) → list[BacktestResult]. Parallelism via multiprocessing.Pool bounded to n_cpus/2 (8GB Mac safety). Aggregates to AggregateReport(n_seeds, sharpe_per_seed, dd_per_seed, pass_mask).

commits.title: feat(scripts): run_backtest CLI + artefact emission
commits.scope: CLI entry point. Args: --mode {clean,leakage,realistic} --n-seeds 10 --horizon 3 --commission-bps 0.5 --slippage-bps 1.5 --output-dir artifacts/. Emits JSON artefact + markdown summary.

parts.name: Reporting + regression pins
parts.description: Human-readable backtest reports + golden-fixture pins on per-seed Sharpe/DD.

commits.title: feat(eval): backtest reports (JSON + markdown)
commits.scope: render_backtest_report(aggregate) → dict + markdown renderer. Per-seed table, aggregate percentiles, regime-conditional Sharpe, per-desk P&L contribution. Optional --with-plots lazily imports matplotlib.

commits.title: test(eval): regression pins on per-seed Sharpe + DD
commits.scope: Golden-fixture-style pins on per-seed Sharpe + max-drawdown values. Re-record only with explicit justification. Pattern mirrors _GOLDEN_*_SHA256 in test_sim_equity_vrp.py.

parts.name: P&L attribution
parts.description: Extend existing LODO + Shapley attribution from signal/grading space into P&L space.

commits.title: feat(attribution): LODO in P&L space
commits.scope: Compare full-roster P&L vs each single-desk-removed P&L; attribute delta to removed desk. Uses eval/hot_swap.py pattern for clean swap.

commits.title: feat(attribution): exact Shapley on coalition P&L
commits.scope: Exact Shapley over desk coalitions (n ≤ 6 per §9.2 cap; current roster has 5 = 3 oil + 2 equity, under cap). Uses itertools.combinations like existing attribution/shapley.py.

parts.name: Improvement workstreams
parts.description: The meat of the phase — measurement is foundation, these commits actually move the numbers.

commits.title: feat(research_loop): controller parameter tuning
commits.scope: Grid search over ControllerParams.k_regime ∈ {0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0} × pos_limit_regime ∈ {0.5, 1.0, 2.0} per regime. Selects combo maximising held-out Sharpe subject to max_drawdown < 0.25. Walk-forward OOS validation. Emits promote_controller_params event. Does NOT modify controller/decision.py (frozen).

commits.title: feat(desks/supply_disruption_news): BVAR escalation
commits.scope: §7.3 escalation 1: Bayesian VAR head (small PyMC model, ≤8 parameters). Selector pattern preserves ridge default; BVAR is opt-in A/B. Acceptance: BVAR Sharpe ≥ ridge Sharpe + 0.1 on ≥6/10 seeds; else log as capability-claim learning and stay on ridge.

commits.title: feat(desks/oil_demand_nowcast): Kalman escalation
commits.scope: §7.3 escalation 2: state-space / Kalman filter head. Handles mixed-frequency updates natively. Same A/B pattern + acceptance threshold as E2.

commits.title: feat(research_loop): P&L margin promotion path
commits.scope: Extend propose_validate_and_promote with margin_pnl option alongside existing MSE margin. Candidate promoted only if held-out P&L ≥ current + margin_pnl. Used by E1 grid search.

parts.name: Risk / governance
parts.description: Functioning-trading-system touchpoints at stub level for synthetic, with real interfaces.

commits.title: feat(research_loop): kill-switch + daily-loss-limit handler
commits.scope: Daily-loss-limit event handler: if current_day_pnl < -daily_loss_threshold, emit kill_switch_tripped event that retires all desks. Resets at next session unless multi-day drawdown threshold also breached. Config-pinned thresholds.

commits.title: test(eval): realistic-contamination P&L stress test
commits.scope: Fit desks on clean, drive through realistic mode held-out, verify P&L ≥ 70% of clean-mode P&L (graceful-degradation claim). Mirrors test_phase_b_attribution_degrades_monotonically_vs_clean on P&L instead of Shapley variance.

parts.name: Integration + acceptance
parts.description: End-to-end integration test + phase completion manifest + spec v1.17 §12.3 addition.

commits.title: test(phase_2p): end-to-end 10-seed integration + regression pins
commits.scope: End-to-end: 10-seed backtest across oil (3-desk) + equity-VRP (2-desk); controller tuned per E1; best-of ridge/BVAR/Kalman per desk. Pinned Sharpe + DD + turnover per seed. This test replaces test_logic_gate_multi_scenario as Phase 2P done-criterion artefact.

commits.title: docs(spec,pm): v1.17 §12.3 Phase 2P done-criterion + completion manifest
commits.scope: Phase 2P completion manifest: achieved metrics vs AC1-AC5, per-desk P&L contributions, regime-conditional differentiation, transaction-cost assumptions, any new capability debits. Spec v1.17 change-log entry + §12.3 Phase 2P done-criterion section. master_plan.md timeline row.

files_to_modify_additive_only.change: Append pnl_events + backtest_runs tables. Non-breaking per §4.6.
v1.17 change-log entry + new §12.3 Phase 2P done-criterion section.
At G2, open new debits for any unmet AC.

frozen_exception_note: Controller parameter TUNING via ControllerParams rows (E1) is permitted under §8.2a — k_regime and pos_limit_regime are runtime-promoted via the controller_params table; no code change to Controller.decide.

existing_functions_to_reuse.usage: Gate 3 runtime harness; reused in B1 to verify each backtest step's decisions compose with hot-swap.
Template for D1's P&L-space LODO port.
Template for D2's coalition-Shapley port to P&L.
Extended in E4 with P&L-margin path (parallel signature; does not replace MSE margin).
Oil backtest harness; all three modes (clean/leakage/realistic) available.
Reused for per-backtest tmp DuckDB setup.

risks.name: First-backtest calibration shock
risks.description: No prior baseline; first 10-seed run may show dismally low or embarrassingly high Sharpe.
risks.mitigation: Run A1-A4 + B1-B3 + G1 first with default config, publish raw numbers, THEN calibrate acceptance thresholds before E1-E4.

risks.name: §7.3 escalation compute constraint (E2, E3)
risks.description: BVAR + Kalman on PyMC may exceed 8GB peak memory on the target Mac.
risks.mitigation: Bounded parameter count (≤8 params), fallback to ridge with explicit debit logging. E2+E3 opt-in; default stays on ridge.

risks.name: Goodhart's Law
risks.description: Optimising for pinned Sharpe ≥ 0.5 and DD < 20% risks over-tuning to pinned seeds.
risks.mitigation: Walk-forward OOS mandatory in E1-E4; G1 pins multi-seed regression values; E1 uses separate validation split.

risks.name: Transaction-cost arbitrariness
risks.description: Commission 0.5bps + slippage 1.5bps is a judgement call for synthetic research.
risks.mitigation: Config-pinned at A2; sensitivity sweep in G1 at costs × 0.5 and × 2.0.

risks.name: Phase 2 deadline pressure
risks.description: Phase 2 hard deadline 2026-07-17 per raid_log R-01. Phase 2P adds ~4-6 weeks.
risks.mitigation: Realistic ship 2026-06-15 earliest; slippage to 2026-07-31 a real risk. If deadline fixed, drop E2+E3 (§7.3 escalations) and ship E1+E4+F+G only (~14 commits instead of 19).

risks.name: Schema append (A4) regressions
risks.description: Adding pnl_events + backtest_runs is non-breaking per §4.6, but test_replay_determinism.py may have row-count assertions.
risks.mitigation: Review during A4 PR; keep schema append strictly additive.

risks.name: Kill-switch semantics (F1)
risks.description: Retiring all desks on a single day's loss is aggressive; naive implementation could flap in high-vol regimes.
risks.mitigation: Require two consecutive breach days OR cumulative-drawdown trigger; pin thresholds in kill_switch_config.yaml before E1 grid search begins.

gates.check: Regime-conditional Sharpe differentiation — ≥ 2 desks with std/mean|Sharpe| ≥ 0.1
Gate 3 3/3 under backtest runner; full test suite green; D12 golden fixtures byte-identical

verification.blocker_on_failure: Any AC miss without an in-budget capability debit blocks Phase 2P closure.

commit_sequence_summary.title: feat(eval): Sharpe / Sortino / drawdown / turnover metrics
test(eval): regression pins on per-seed Sharpe + DD
feat(attribution): exact Shapley on coalition P&L
docs(spec,pm): v1.17 §12.3 Phase 2P done-criterion + completion manifest

natural_checkpoints.description: Measurement infrastructure + backtest harness ship; first unweighted Sharpe readings visible. If wildly off expectations, recalibrate before E1-E4.
Controller tuning + P&L-margin promotion ship; best improvement without §7.3 escalation is measured. Decision point on whether to commit compute to E2+E3 escalations.

evaluation_prompt_suggestions: Does this plan have a realistic path to demonstrating Sharpe ≥ 0.5 on synthetic markets, given the D1 model-quality debit that currently shows merged desks fail Gate 1 in Phase A clean mode on seed 16?
Is the §7.3 escalation sequence (ridge → BVAR → Kalman) well-justified by the economic motivations in docs/first_principles_redesign.md, or is it speculative?
Is the transaction-cost model (0.5bps commission + 1.5bps slippage) defensible for a synthetic research environment, or should it be higher to reflect likely real-world costs at Phase 3?
Do the pre-registered AC1-AC5 thresholds create meaningful hurdles, or are they too easily satisfied (e.g. Sharpe ≥ 0.5 is a low bar)?
Is the kill-switch design (F1) adequate for a synthetic environment, or should it be more sophisticated (CVaR-based, multi-horizon)?
Does the plan appropriately separate architectural invariants (AC5) from performance claims (AC1-AC4)?
Are there missing workstreams — e.g., alternative data augmentation, ensemble methods, or regime-transition detection improvements?
